event.title: Shreans Daga Foundation: The Quantum Awakening
event.description: Join Shreans Daga for a transformative 4-day journey into spiritual science and manifestation. Held at the world-renowned Pyramid Valley, this retreat integrates deep meditation with quantum insights to help you design your destiny.

slots.title: Check-in & Registration
slots.desc: Welcome and orientation at the PVI reception.

slots.title: Mindful Lunch
slots.desc: Sattvic meals at designated dining halls.

slots.title: Pyramid Meditation
slots.desc: Deep meditation inside the Maitreya-Buddha Pyramid.

slots.title: Sun Salutations
slots.desc: Morning yoga and breathwork in the valley.

slots.title: Silent Contemplation
slots.desc: Individual practice sessions across the lush campus.

slots.title: Workshop: Energy Centers
slots.desc: Balancing the chakras for physical and mental health.

slots.title: Inner Silence
slots.desc: Extended meditation session for deep clarity.

slots.title: Nature Walk
slots.desc: Exploring the healing energies of PVI.

slots.title: Gratitude Ritual
slots.desc: Final morning practice and appreciation circle.

main.name: Shreans Daga
main.bio: Shreans Daga is a visionary spiritual scientist dedicated to teaching the art of manifestation and high-vibrational living. Having mastered numerous spiritual disciplines, he simplifies complex ancient wisdom into actionable quantum science for the modern world. His mission is to empower individuals to live a life of abundance, joy, and profound inner peace.

others.name: Master Dr. Vishwa
others.bio: An expert in the geometry of spiritual spaces, Dr. Vishwa guides seekers in utilizing the unique energy of the Maitreya-Buddha Pyramid for accelerated spiritual growth.

others.name: Sadhvi Meera
others.bio: Sadhvi Meera brings a gentle, heart-centered approach to meditation, focusing on emotional release and deep self-love.

insights.title: The Power of the Pyramid
insights.text: Pyramid Valley International houses the world's largest meditation pyramid. Its sacred geometry amplifies cosmic energy, allowing meditators to reach deeper states of consciousness 3 times faster than in conventional spaces.

insights.title: Quantum Manifestation
insights.text: Everything is energy. By learning to tune your internal frequency, you can collapse the wave function of possibility into your desired reality. This is the core teaching of the Shreans Daga Foundation.

insights.title: Sattvic Sustenance
insights.text: Fuel your soul with high-prana meals. Whether at Annadana or Soul Nest, our food is prepared with love and mindfulness to support your energetic transformation.
